issues: Tunnel URL https://gzip-fcc-environment-sheet.trycloudflare.com returns HTTP 403 host_not_allowed — cloudflared has disconnected from Cloudflare network.
Bug found and fixed in watchdog.sh: tunnel liveness check was reading URL from index.html (no URL there) instead of api-url.json — tunnel was never being restarted on disconnect.
Fix pushed to GitHub (commit 070fcc0). Next watchdog cron run should detect dead tunnel and restart cloudflared.
Cannot reach /api/board, /api/command, /api/status, or /api/health-report. Falling back to GitHub health_log.json write.
This is the 2nd consecutive down run (previous: 2026-05-18T19:12:05Z). Root cause now patched.

static_analysis.watchdog_fix: Fixed tunnel URL source from index.html to api-url.json (commit 070fcc0)
